creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

guile2-2.0.14_4 build in poudriere stops with segmentation fault and core dump.

Host (metal):
11.2-RELEASE x64

Poudriere jail:
AILNAME    VERSION          ARCH  METHOD TIMESTAMP           PATH
11_2:x86:64 11.2-RELEASE     amd64 ftp    2018-06-27 10:47:25 /portbuild/poudriere/jails/11_2_x86_64

Poudriere version:
poudriere-3.2.7

Last few lines on log (I can send complete log if needed):
../meta/build-env				\
guild compile --target="amd64-portbld-freebsd11.2" -Wunbound-variable -Warity-mismatch -Wformat	\
  -L "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/guile2/work/guile-2.0.14/module" -L "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/guile2/work/guile-2.0.14/module"		\
  -L "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/guile2/work/guile-2.0.14/guile-readline"			\
  -o "language/brainfuck/spec.go" "language/brainfuck/spec.scm"
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:2235: language/brainfuck/spec.go] Segmentation fault (core dumped)
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/guile2/work/guile-2.0.14/module'
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:1841: all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/guile2/work/guile-2.0.14'
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:1727: all] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/guile2/work/guile-2.0.14'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/lang/guile2
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for guile2-2.0.14_4
build of lang/guile2 | guile2-2.0.14_4 ended at Tue Jul  3 22:33:08 CEST 2018
build time: 00:22:16
!!! build failure encountered !!!

I'd be glad to test patches, thank you in advance.
